text: Add modular hybrid code intelligence for semantic maps and improvement discovery
description: Provide code search and mapping that combines exact search, symbols/references, syntax chunks, semantic embeddings, dependency structure, git churn, tests/coverage, and aim history. Expose focused tools such as code_search, symbol_context, change_impact, and high-leverage improvement discovery without loading every capability into every loop.
reflection: Added modular tool loading: core graph/delegation tools stay available, while coding, experiments, and code-intelligence are optional per loop. Existing loops default to all packs. Loop UI persists checkbox selection; worker filters disabled tools before constructing the model request. Verification: backend 53/53 tests, package typechecks, frontend build, and focused capability/embedding/persistence tests (3/3) pass.

status.comment: Semantic/heuristic code intelligence, incremental indexing, and per-loop capability packs are implemented. LSP/AST precision, coverage/failure signals, and aim-history scoring remain.
